antipattern.reason: Marginal lift, full cost. Detector: stage2.type == 'bi-encoder'. Fix: r2-cross-encoder-second-stage.
Rerank has nothing to choose from. Detector: pool_size <= top_k. Fix: r1-pool-2-to-3x-final.

antipattern.description: Benchmark reports only end-to-end MRR; no recall@pool or precision@K split.
antipattern.reason: Bottleneck unidentifiable. Detector: bench missing recall_at_pool or precision_at_topk. Fix: r4-bench-recall-precision-split.
